column1: # All items available in the game world with volumetric physics data
#   name              - Display name shown to player
#   subcategory       - More specific grouping within category
#   base_material     - Primary material_id this item is made from
#   stack_size        - Max stack count (1 = not stackable)
#   durability        - Max durability points (0 = indestructible consumable)
#   description       - Short description of the item
